titular: Google's AI Platform Gemini Introduces Notebooks for Project Organization
cuerpo: The artificial intelligence (AI) platform of Google, Gemini, will introduce a resource called 'Notebooks' that allows you to organize information related to specific topics in one place while using the AI chatbot. Files, previous conversations, and custom instructions can be integrated into the Notebooks, which Gemini may use as context during conversation. The Notebooks resemble much to the 'Projects' function of ChatGPT.
